page_metadata.biotools__summary: TreeJuxtaposer is a free software tool that allows a visual comparison of two trees in Newick format (phylogenies, taxonomies, gene trees, etc.). It can work with trees having up to 500,000 nodes, and automatically calculates and marks the differences.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: TreeJuxtaposer is a free software tool that allows a visual comparison of two trees in Newick format (phylogenies, taxonomies, gene trees, etc.). It can work with trees having up to 500,000 nodes, and automatically calculates and marks the differences.
